reason: primary 'guard, member of security' is clumsy; 'security guard' is the natural everyday term. List sense 'guardian, keeper' is a distinct meaning worth keeping.
sub-def has embedded article 'a mistress'; bare it. Primary 'female friend' is correct.
'reckoning by years' is a wrong/archaic primary; 'årtal' in everyday Swedish means a specific calendar year (e.g. 'vilket årtal?' = 'what year?'). The Wiktionary dump is unreliable here.
list sense 'flush, rich, affluent' is redundant synonyms of the primary 'well-off'; the senses are not meaningfully distinct — collapse into one.
'regain' is a secondary/marginal sense; the dominant everyday meaning of 'återvinna' is 'recycle'. Promote recycle; keep regain in list.
primary 'be greater in some respect' is a vague definition-like gloss; 'surpass, exceed' is the natural flashcard translation.
primary is a sentence-style definition with capital letter; should be a bare adjective gloss.
primary is a long descriptive definition; 'avenue' or 'tree-lined avenue' is the natural translation.
'add, to sum' has a stray 'to' before 'sum' (app adds 'to' for verbs). Fix to 'add, sum up'.
primary 'hint, suggestion, hint' repeats 'hint' twice. Remove duplicate.
'find, to encounter' has a stray 'to' before 'encounter'. Fix phrasing.
'cancel, to revoke' has a stray 'to' before 'revoke'. Fix phrasing.
'superordinate' is linguistic jargon; 'superior, higher-ranking' is what a learner needs. 'Superior' as noun sense (e.g. 'lyda sina överordnade') is captured by the primary.
primary 'accent, an emphasis, a stress' has embedded articles before 'emphasis' and 'stress'. Remove them. Keep all three distinct senses in the list.

'overweight' used as the primary for this noun is uncountable in English ('she has overweight' is not idiomatic, but 'overweight' functions as a mass noun/adj-used-as-noun here). However in Swedish övervikt is commonly used countably too (en övervikt av = a preponderance of). The primary meaning is the uncountable health sense; set uncountable.
sub-def 'to accelerate' is a redundant duplicate of the primary 'accelerate' (app adds 'to' for verbs). Remove the list.
'attacking player' is accurate but wordy; 'striker, forward' is the natural football term and cleaner. Keep 'attacking player' as a clarifying item in the list.
sub-def has embedded article 'a jackass'; bare it.
sub-def has embedded article 'a youngster'; primary and list should be bare. Also 'young man' and 'youngster' are nearly synonymous — collapse into one primary.
sub-def 'a group captain' has embedded article. Bare it.
'overview, a perspective' has embedded article 'a perspective'. Remove it.
'reimbursement' is slightly narrow; 'återbetalning' also means repayment and refund in everyday contexts. Better primary: 'repayment, refund'.
sub-def 'an antenna, an aerial' has embedded article. Bare it. Primary 'antenna' is fine (insect sense).
'quotidian' is an obscure word for language learners; 'everyday, ordinary' is clearer.
the two senses listed are muddled — they overlap but represent distinct meanings: (1) physically sore/tender, (2) emotionally tender/gentle. Clarify the list.
'years' alone is too vague — 'åratal' specifically means 'years on end, for years' (always implying a long stretch). A gloss captures this better.
sub-def 'something currently (or at some given time) topical' is a definition phrase. Tighten it. Also 'up-to-dateness, timeliness' is cleaner already.
